drawer.subtitle: Personal Finance
drawer.overviewDescription: Start here and jump to the most-used surfaces.
drawer.moneyMovementDescription: Move funds and review recurring flows.
drawer.administrationDescription: Manage how the household is structured.

diagnostics.title: Release diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Check the production wiring before deploying or sharing links.
diagnostics.configurationSubtitle: These checks cover Supabase env, OAuth origins, storage, and invite email reachability.
diagnostics.supabaseUrlDescription: Required for auth, database, storage, and Edge Functions.
diagnostics.supabaseKeyDescription: Client-safe key used by the Expo bundle.
diagnostics.inviteWebUrlDescription: Base URL used when creating invitation links.
diagnostics.oauthOriginDescription: Add this origin in Google OAuth for web login and preview testing.
diagnostics.storageBucketDescription: Checks whether the {{bucket}} bucket can be reached by the current session.
diagnostics.inviteFunctionDescription: Checks whether {{functionName}} responds to a safe preflight request.
diagnostics.notificationTestDescription: Sends an immediate local notification to this device. It does not require remote push configuration.
diagnostics.notificationTestSent: Test notification sent. Check your notification banner.
diagnostics.notificationBrowserUnsupported: This browser does not support system notifications.
diagnostics.notificationSecureContextRequired: Browser notifications require a secure HTTPS connection.
diagnostics.notificationNotShown: The browser accepted the test but did not show it. Check this site's notification permission and your system notification settings.

budget.title: Monthly Budget
budget.subtitle: Configure the household rules, preview the month, and generate the transfers.
budget.resumeSubtitle: A quick summary before you edit the household settings.
budget.householdSettingsSubtitle: These settings drive how the simulation calculates the remaining cash.
budget.name: Budget name
budget.monthlyInputsSubtitle: Set each member salary and the cash account that receives it.
budget.cashAccountHint: Choose the account that receives the salary.
budget.rulesSubtitle: Create the monthly transfers that will be generated after salaries arrive.
budget.sourceAccountHint: Choose the account that pays for this rule.
budget.destinationAccountHint: Choose the account that receives the transfer.
budget.destinationSelectorHint: Choose the account that receives the transfer.
budget.destinationPotHint: Choose the pig bank that receives the transfer.
budget.previewSubtitle: Review the totals before saving or confirming the run.
budget.runsSubtitle: Open a run to inspect its saved inputs or cancel a draft.

settings.title: Household Settings
settings.feedbackSubtitle: Send an idea, report a bug, or follow an existing conversation.
settings.createHouseholdSubtitle: Use this to set up a new household instead of auto-creating one at signup.
settings.myHouseholdsSubtitle: Rename households you own. Households with transactions are soft deleted; empty ones are removed permanently.
settings.onlyOwnerHouseholdEdit: Only the household owner can rename or delete this household.
settings.deleteHouseholdMessage: This will delete the household. If it has transactions, it will be archived instead of removed permanently.
settings.onlyAdminsInvite: Only owners and admins can send invitations.
settings.alreadyInvited: This email already has a pending invitation.
settings.emailNotAvailable: Email function is not available yet. Share this link manually for now.
settings.noMyInvitations: No invitations pending for your account.
settings.leaveMessage: Are you sure you want to leave {{householdName}}? You will lose access to all household data.
settings.currencySubtitle: Choose the currency used across the app.
settings.backupSubtitle: Export this household or import a saved backup as a new household.
settings.backupDescription: Exports include household settings, accounts, categories, transactions, recurring rules, saving pots, and monthly budget data. Invoice files are not bundled in this version.
settings.backupConfirmSubtitle: This will create a new household from {{householdName}}.
settings.backupConfirmNote: A new household will be created and set as your current household. Attachment files are skipped; their metadata remains in the export file.
settings.backupExportUnavailableMessage: Household export currently downloads the JSON file on web. Import still works from a JSON file.
settings.backupInvalidMessage: Choose a valid SmartFinance household backup JSON file.
settings.backupUnknownError: Something went wrong while processing the backup.
settings.backupSignInRequired: You must be signed in to import a household backup.
settings.backupImportCompleteMessage: {{householdName}} is now your current household. Imported {{transactions}} transaction(s).

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Welcome back{{name}}. Your household is ready.
dashboard.allocationSubtitle: Saving pots are goals backed by those accounts, so they are shown separately and not added again.
dashboard.byPersonSubtitle: Investment accounts, savings accounts, and pots grouped per household member.
dashboard.recentTransactionsSubtitle: The latest household activity from Supabase.
dashboard.noExpenseData: No expense data for this month.

accounts.title: Accounts
accounts.subtitle: Manage household accounts using the existing account hooks and service layer.
accounts.createSubtitle: This uses the current account creation mutation.
accounts.name: Name
accounts.sharedOwnerDescription: No specific owner. Shared by the household.

transactions.title: Transactions
transactions.subtitle: Create and review household income and expenses.
transactions.filtersSubtitle: Switch between all, income, and expense transactions.
transactions.filtersCollapsed: Open filters to refine the transaction list.
transactions.createSubtitle: This uses the existing transaction mutation and schema.

categories.title: Categories
categories.subtitle: Create and manage the category structure used by transactions.
categories.summarySubtitle: A quick look at the current category set.
categories.parentHint: Use a parent category id if you are creating a nested category.
categories.iconHint: Choose an icon to display for this category.
categories.createSubtitle: Define a new category and choose its type, parent, and icon.
categories.name: Name
categories.filterSubtitle: Switch between income, expense, and account categories without changing the create form.
categories.emptyFilteredSubtitle: Try another type or create a category for this section.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.subtitle: Track limits for payments and transfers

savings.title: Savings
savings.subtitle: Track saving pots and their balances.
savings.name: Name
savings.sharedAccountsHint: This pot is shared by the household and uses all accounts.
savings.selectedAccountsHint: Pick one or more accounts. If none are selected, all household accounts are used.
savings.selectAccountsRequiredHint: Pick at least one account for an account-specific pot.
savings.noAccountsAvailable: No accounts available for this household.
savings.editPotSubtitle: Update the pot name, target and which accounts count towards it.
savings.balancesSubtitle: The current balance view from the existing saving pot balances query.
savings.currentSubtitle: Delete pots using the existing mutation.
savings.name: Name
savings.estimateNote: Based on active recurring transfers for the selected accounts.
savings.forecastUnavailableNoTarget: Add a target amount to see a completion forecast.
savings.forecastUnavailableNoContributions: No active recurring transfers or monthly budget rules target this pot yet.
savings.forecastUnavailableBeyondHorizon: This target cannot be forecast within the next 30 years.

recurring.title: Recurring
recurring.subtitle: Schedule repeated transactions and manage their activation.
recurring.createdByPlaceholder: Select who owns this recurring rule
recurring.excludeMonthsHint: Pick the months when this rule should be skipped.

transfers.title: Transfers
transfers.subtitle: Move money between accounts
transfers.howItWorksSubtitle: Transfers create two linked transaction rows through the transfer RPC.
transfers.howItWorksBody: The source account is debited as an expense and the destination account is credited as income, keeping balances consistent.
transfers.executionHistoryUnavailable: Execution history will appear here when scheduled execution is available.
transfers.requiresDestination: Choose a destination for this recurring transfer.
transfers.invalidMovement: Complete the required fields before saving this movement.
transfers.excludeMonthsHint: Pick the months when this movement should be skipped.

members.title: Members
members.subtitle: Invite people, manage membership, and transfer ownership.
members.pendingSubtitle: Household invitations issued from the app.
members.mySubtitle: Invitations addressed to the signed-in user.

invite.invalidMessage: This link needs a token to work.
invite.invalidDescription: This invitation link is missing a token. Ask the household admin to send a new invite.
invite.subtitle: A household invitation is waiting for you.
invite.signInBody: Sign in with the invited account and we’ll finish joining the household automatically.
invite.lookupAfterSignIn: Once you sign in, we’ll look up the invitation details for the invited account.
invite.wrongAccount: This invite was sent to a different Google account. Please switch accounts and try again.
invite.acceptedMessage: Invitation accepted. Redirecting you to Settings...
invite.signInMessage: Sign in with the invited account and we’ll finish the join automatically.

onboarding.welcomeDescription: SmartFinance keeps your household accounts, plans, and goals in one place. This short guide shows you where to start.
onboarding.completionDescription: You can reopen this guide at any time from Settings, and new features will introduce themselves when they are available.
onboarding.restartDescription: See the full SmartFinance guide again.
onboarding.featureGuideDescription: This feature is new. Take a quick look at how it works.

dashboard.title: Your financial overview
dashboard.description: See your tracked wealth, this month's movement, accounts, goals, and recent activity in one view.
dashboard.tip: Use the section headers to collapse details and focus on what matters now.

accounts.title: Keep every account together
accounts.description: Create bank, savings, cash, investment, credit, and PPR accounts. Assign an owner or leave an account shared.
accounts.tip: Balances and ownership make it easy to understand individual and shared money.

transactions.title: Record money in and out
transactions.description: Add income and expenses with an account, category, date, and optional notes or invoice attachment.
transactions.tip: Use filters to quickly review a person's spending, an account, or a transaction type.

transfers.title: Move money without losing track
transfers.description: Transfers link the source and destination accounts, keeping both balances consistent. You can also schedule recurring movements.
transfers.tip: Choose the source and destination carefully: a transfer is recorded as an expense and matching income.

budget.title: Plan the month before it starts
budget.description: Set household income, recurring budget rules, active months, and destinations. Review the preview before confirming the month.
budget.tip: Use active months for seasonal rules, such as summer or Christmas contributions.

savings.title: Turn savings into clear goals
savings.description: Create saving pots, set a target, connect the accounts that fund them, and follow progress toward completion.
savings.tip: Open a pot's contribution forecast to see the expected monthly or yearly path to its goal.

categories.title: Organise every movement
categories.description: Create income, expense, and account categories so reports and transaction lists stay useful.
categories.tip: Use parent categories to keep detailed categories organised.

members.title: Manage your household together
members.description: Invite people to the household, review memberships, and manage access as your household changes.
members.tip: Owners and admins can send invitations and manage other members.

settings.title: Control your household setup
settings.description: Manage household details, language, theme, currency, invitations, and backups from one place.
settings.tip: Return here whenever you want to review the app guide or change your preferences.

feedback.title: Help shape SmartFinance
feedback.subtitle: Share an idea or report a problem, then follow every update from the team.
feedback.newSubtitle: A little context helps us understand, reproduce, and act quickly.

kind.suggestionDescription: Propose an improvement or a new way to work.
kind.bugDescription: Tell us about something that did not work as expected.

fields.title: Short title
fields.suggestionDescriptionPlaceholder: What would improve your experience, and why?
fields.bugDescriptionPlaceholder: What were you trying to do when the problem happened?

feedback.screenshotsHelp: Up to five images. Avoid including passwords or sensitive financial details.
feedback.privacyNote: Feedback is linked to your account so we can reply and keep you updated.
feedback.submitErrorMessage: Please try again in a moment.
feedback.timelineSubtitle: Track status changes and continue the conversation.
feedback.loadError: Your feedback could not be loaded.
feedback.emptyBody: Your suggestions and bug reports will appear here after you send them.
feedback.replyPlaceholder: Add context or answer the team...
feedback.withdrawMessage: Withdraw “{{title}}”? The conversation will be kept for reference.

adminFeedback.title: Feedback inbox
adminFeedback.subtitle: Triage customer context, coordinate ownership, and close the loop with clear release notes.
adminFeedback.filtersSubtitle: Search the inbox and combine workflow filters.
adminFeedback.searchPlaceholder: Title, description, submitter, or feedback ID
adminFeedback.loadError: The feedback inbox could not be loaded.
adminFeedback.emptyBody: Try widening the filters or clearing the search.
adminFeedback.selectBody: Choose an inbox item to review its context and update the workflow.
adminFeedback.internalNotePlaceholder: Capture investigation details, decisions, or hand-off context...
adminFeedback.responseHelp: This reply is visible to the person who submitted the feedback.
adminFeedback.responsePlaceholder: Share an update, ask a question, or explain the resolution...

auth.loginDescription: Google signs you in through Supabase so the app can load your session.
auth.loginFooter: By continuing you accept the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
auth.googleSignInErrorMessage: Please try again in a moment.
auth.preparingDashboard: Your financial home is taking shape
auth.preparingDashboardDescription: Connecting your profile, household, and latest numbers.
auth.googleCallbackErrorMessage: We could not complete the Google sign-in. Please try again.
